Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Onyx Epoxy Flooring to get the job done right.

“Three winters later and not a single crack or salt stain on our double garage in Southwest Minneapolis. They even matched the flecks to our 1920s Craftsman's original tile colors. The crew worked through a November cold snap to finish before snow season.”

Anders T. Garage Floor Coatings
Feb 14, 2025

“Our Linden Hills basement used to grow mold every April when groundwater rose. Onyx installed their vapor barrier system last fall - first dry spring in 12 years! The matte finish looks like polished concrete but feels warmer underfoot during polar vortexes.”

Ming-Li W. Basement Floor Epoxy
Mar 22, 2025

“As a North Loop brewery owner, I needed floors that could handle -20°F deliveries and constant chemical spills. Onyx's industrial coating has outlasted three Minnesota winters with zero wear - even where pallet jacks turn all day. Their overnight installation meant zero lost production time.”

Devon R. Commercial Epoxy
Jan 5, 2025

“The 'Lake Superior Agate' design in our Edina sunroom makes winter bearable - sunlight reflects the metallic flakes like ice crystals. Our golden retriever's nails haven't made a scratch despite daily zoomies. Perfect for showing off during book club when it's -10°F outside.”

Elise K. Decorative Flake Floors
Apr 18, 2025

“After three failed attempts by others, Onyx permanently fixed our Plymouth garage floor heave. Their thermal imaging showed exactly where cold air was penetrating under the slab. Two winters later and the laser level proves it's still perfectly flat.”

Carlos M. Concrete Repair
Feb 3, 2025

“No more anxiety about my parents slipping on our Bloomington patio. The 'Black Ice' coating is invisible until it senses moisture - brilliant for Minnesota's freeze-thaw cycles. Installation took just an afternoon during an October warm spell.”

Priya S. Anti-Slip Coatings
Mar 30, 2025
Onyx Epoxy Flooring

Trusted epoxy flooring professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
